entities.name: 29 CFR 1910.119
entities.description: Process safety management of highly hazardous chemicals

entities.name: Process Safety Management
entities.description: A systematic approach to evaluating the whole process to prevent unwanted releases of hazardous chemicals

entities.name: Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA)
entities.description: A government agency responsible for ensuring workplace safety and health

entities.name: Clean Air Act Amendments
entities.description: A law that requires employers to implement process safety management programs

entities.name: Hazard Communication Standard
entities.description: A standard that requires employers to inform employees about hazardous chemicals in the workplace
